zh.lifeSummary: 當Jonet ap Gibbon於大約1414年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根時，她的父親Gibbon ap Griffith44歲，母親Julia Raglan46歲。她與Thomas ap Gwilym在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jonet ap Gibbon于大约1414年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根时，她的父亲Gibbon ap Griffith44岁，母亲Julia Raglan46岁。她与Thomas ap Gwilym在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Gibbon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Giboin (ancient Germanic Gebawin).
English: alternatively, a diminutive of the personal name   Gibb  .
Scottish and Irish: variant of   McGibbon  .

variants.name: Gibb
meanings: English: from the personal name Gibb, a pet form of Gilbert (compare Gibbs ). This surname is also frequent in Scotland.

variants.name: Gibbons
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Gibbon , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish (Mayo): in Ireland, the name is frequent and has been Gaelicized as Mac Giobúin. It is also found as a variant of Fitzgibbon .

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Jonet ap Gibbon was born about 1414, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Gibbon ap Griffith, was 44 and her mother, Julia Raglan, was 46. She married Thomas ap Gwilym in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jonet ap Gibbon est née environ 1414, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gibbon ap Griffith, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Julia Raglan, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas ap Gwilym à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jonet ap Gibbon um 1414 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gibbon ap Griffith 44 und ihre Mutter Julia Raglan 46. Sie hat in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas ap Gwilym geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jonet ap Gibbon è nata il circa 1414 nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gibbon ap Griffith, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Julia Raglan, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato Thomas ap Gwilym nel Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Jonet ap Gibbonが約1414年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Gibbon ap Griffithは44歳，母Julia Raglanは46歳であった。イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアでThomas ap Gwilymと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Jonet ap Gibbon(이)가 대략 1414년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gibbon ap Griffith(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Julia Raglan(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 Thomas ap Gwilym(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jonet ap Gibbon nasceu aproximadamente 1414, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gibbon ap Griffith, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Julia Raglan, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas ap Gwilym em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jonet ap Gibbon родилась около 1414 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gibbon ap Griffith было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Julia Raglan, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas ap Gwilym в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jonet ap Gibbon nació aproximadamente 1414, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gibbon ap Griffith, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Julia Raglan, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Thomas ap Gwilym en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas.
